Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

candidate_texts: Title: Kidskin- Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil- Helps Combat Body and Foot Odor and Stubborn Body Acne and Skin Issues - Cruelty Free, Gluten Free, Paraben Free, Sulfate Free, Unscented, and Vegan- Made in USA Description: Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is designed exclusively for teens, tweens, pre teens, and boys and girls to work as an effective, yet gentle body wash. Natural ingredients like Allantoin and Bisabolol nourish beyond surface level, and penetrate into the lower levels of the skin for the deepest hydration possible, while active ingredient tea tree oil works to fight body acne and skin issues teens are commonly prone to. Unlike shower bars and other soaps, our products are designed to soothe problematic and compromised skin. With 100% Natural ingredients that are paraben, sulfate, fragrance, and gluten free, the Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is gentle enough for every day use. Our mission is to provide teens (like our own!) with a body wash that leaves them feeling fresh and confident so they can focus on what really matters- every day. Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Musa Sapientum (Banana) E

Title: Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit with Ultra Gentle Lotion, Bubble Bath, Foaming Shampoo & Wash, Nourishing Baby Oil, and Face & Hand Cloths Description: Babies deserve a fresh start in life with ingredients from nature that are gentle for their delicate skin. Experience our most popular natural Burts Bees Baby products together in one. Our gentle, effective and natural baby products cleanse, soften and help moisturize babys precious skin safely and naturally. Its easy to make bath time fun with the mild, tear-free bubble bath, then simply cleanse with the foaming 2-in-1 baby shampoo and body wash. Finish by moisturizing with ultra gentle lotion and nourishing baby oil to keep skin soft and fresh. A pack of face and hand cloths is handy for on-the-go cleansing. These baby care essentials are pediatrician tested, gentle enough to use every day and formulated without parabens, phthalates, SLS, petrolatum or synthetic fragrances, so you can feel good about caring for babys delicate skin. This new baby gift basket is a sweet gift for any baby shower occasion.

Title: Natural Solution Himalayan Pink Salt Body Scrub with Organic Marula Essential Oil, Moisturizes and Nourishes Face & Skin - 12.3 Oz Description: Natural Solution Organic Marula Oil Body Scrub Exfoliate and nourish your skin with this luxurious Natural Solution body scrub made with organic marula oil. Marula oil is a natural oil & is known for its ability to moisturize and protect the skin, as well as to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. This body scrub is also made with Himalayan pink salt, which is a natural exfoliator that helps to remove dead skin cells and leave your skin feeling smooth and soft. The scrub is gentle enough for daily use, and it is perfect for all skin types. Usage: Apply a generous amount of scrub to wet skin. Massage in circular motions for 2-3 minutes. Rinse with water. Use 2 times per week for best results. Caution: Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with water. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Benefits: 1- Exfoliates and removes dead skin cells 2- Moisturizes and nourishes the skin 3- Protects the skin from free radicals 4- Leaves skin

candidate_texts: Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

Effect: Absorbent pores of blackheads and stubborn dirt, shrink pores, regulate oil secretion. How to use： Step 1 : Wash your face with warm water and cover it with a hot towel to open the pores . Step 2 : Spread the Blackhead remover mask gently on your face and wait 10-15 for it to dry. Step 3 : Peel off the black mask gently from chin to forehead . Step 4 : Rains with cold water and you may apply your daily skin care products afterwards. Tips: 1.The Blackhead Mask is only used for removing blackheads, exfoliating and cleaning the skin. 2.No effective against acne. Don’t use it on your acne or inflamed areas. 3.Spread the Blackhead Mask slowly in the same direction on your face and don’t stay on the same area too long. 4. Title: Yes To Face Wipes for Women and Men, Sensitive Facial Cleansing Wipes for use as a Make Up Remover, Cleaning, Soothing, Cucumbers Aloe Vera (Pack of 2) Description: Yes To Cucumbers Hypoallergenic Facial Wipes gently remove dirt, sweat and makeup (eye makeup too!) without the need to rinse. Whether you're out and about, going for a run, or having a late night, these wipes make it a snap to refresh on-the-go. Packed with green superfoods these all-natural, biodegradable wipes naturally refresh and rejuvenate all-in-one. Stay gorgeous, and go from zero to clean in seconds! Snap up the lid and snatch out a towelette! Gently glide across your face and neck. Feel refreshed? You should- your skin is clean, revitalized and nourished- in just a snap! This Mist will seal in any hairstyle, bridging the gap between natural and salon quality. GIOVANNI was the first full-range, salon-inspired hair-care brand in natural product stores, and today is the #1 selling Hair Care* lines in the United States Natural Products Industry. But before there was a brand, there was a pioneer. Arthur Guidotti had a vision and a love for all things hair. He began developing his passion as a hairstylist in Hollywood and Beverly Hills. By the 1960s, Arthur was maturing his talents and decided to open his own salon, called On Sunset. The salon was a bustling site, on the famous Sunset Strip, and a hit with many Hollywood celebrities, including Lucille Ball. Since 1979 the GIOVANNI Rule of Balance has been our commitment to make each product as pure and as natural as possible without sacrificing exceptional product performance. Step 2 : Spread the Blackhead remover mask gently on your face and wait 10-15 for it to dry. Step 3 : Peel off the black mask gently from chin to forehead . Step 4 : Rains with cold water and you may apply your daily skin care products afterwards. Tips: 1.The Blackhead Mask is only used for removing blackheads, exfoliating and cleaning the skin. 2.No effective against acne. We also ensured that our newest mascara is smooth and buildable—no clumps or smudging—making it the perfect finishing touch to any look, be it everyday glam, a smoky eye, or cat eye. What’s more, we tested our product to ensure it is suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers, so go ahead and magnify lashes to your chosen intensity! And because we love the environment as much as we love your delicate eyes, part of the mascara packaging is made with post-consumer recycled materials. When it comes to your skincare, you need durable, long-lasting skincare tools you can rely on for a consistent daily routine – not low-quality, poorly made gua sha and face rollers that chip and fall apart after just a few uses. At Frecia’s Allure, we use only 100% pure Brazilian Rose Quartz in our Rose Quartz Facial Roller & Gua Sha Kit, for skincare tools that won’t chip or crack. Our die-cast, single-piece roller handles are rust-resistant, and while many gua sha tools are disappointingly thin and frail, our Gua Sha is thick and substantial – for a comfortable hand feel and broader skin contact. Squeaky facial rollers spoiling your zen at-home spa session? Our face rollers are crafted with special silicone inserts to eliminate noise – so you can enjoy quiet, relaxing home skincare sessions. Title: Lenghthening Mascara by Almay,Volume & Lift, Eye Makeup, Hypoallergenic and Fragrance Free, 010 Blackest Black, 0.24 Fl Oz Description: Enjoy visibly longer, lifted lashes in one gentle swipe with Almay Length & Lift Mascara™. Our clean, flake-free formula is enriched with a lash-caring complex of plant-based waxes and hair conditioners that nourish for healthy looking eyelashes. Plus, the brush is made of 100% plant-derived bristles that are designed to evenly coat and separate lashes from root to tip. We also ensured that our newest mascara is smooth and buildable—no clumps or smudging—making it the perfect finishing touch to any look, be it everyday glam, a smoky eye, or cat eye. What’s more, we tested our product to ensure it is suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers, so go ahead and magnify lashes to your chosen intensity! And because we love the environment as much as we love your delicate eyes, part of the mascara packaging is made with post-consumer recycled materials. Title: Philips Norelco QC5055 Power Hair Clipper Description: Product Description Philips Norelco's Power Hair Clipper cuts normal, coarse and curly hair. The turbo power option can be turned on when hair is more difficult to get through. This easy-to-use hair clipper brings simplicity to you life, giving you all the options without all the pieces. Three hair clipper combs provide 15 length options (up to 1-3/5 inch long), while the no slip grip ensures that the Philips Norelco Power Hair Clipper cuts exactly where it should--with or without a cord. Attachments can be rinsed clean with some running water and blades are self-sharpening, needing only minimal maintenance. Amazon.com 100% turbo power. Cuts all hair types. The Philips Power Clipper gives you the power of a corded clipper with all the benefits of a rechargable one. Thanks to its powerful motor and battery, it is suited to cut all hair types with ease--even coarse, curly and thick hair. Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

Ionization Technology PARWIN PRO employs ionic ceramic tourmaline-infused plates for professional flat iron, which helps generate ions that contributes to restoring the moisture and health of the hair. Title: OZNaturals Facial Sunscreen This Anti Aging SPF 30, Broad Spectrum, Mineral Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide Will Help You Keep That Healthy Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing a facial sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin. As a zinc sunscreen, it utilizes the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, along with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate. This natural sunscreen offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a moisturizing formulation.

Title: Makeup Blender Sponge- Makeup Sponges For Foundation And Beauty Products- Latex Free Makeup Sponge- Beauty Sponge For Liquid, Cream And Powder Makeup. ACSU Description: This high quality non-latex and non-allergenic blending sponges for makeup is the best option to upgrade your makeup game and feel your better self. This sponge absorbs the minimum possible amount of makeup product leaving a perfect finish on the skin, it works perfectly with every type of makeup product such as liquid, cream or powder. Have the best experience with the soft feeling of our black makeup sponge. We recommend you to get your sponge wet and squeeze it until it has fully expanded. Once it has soak enough water, squeeze the sponge until it does not have any excess water and it will be perfectly dampened to start applying your makeup. Apply or set your makeup with bouncing motion, use the pointed side to blend makeup under the eyes and places that are hard to get into, like around the nose; the round sides for large areas of the face and the flat sides for contour, baking and precise effects. Title: Grown Alchemist Anti-Pollution Primer (50ml / 1.69oz) Description: GROWN ALCHEMIST ANTI – POLLUTION PRIMER. A revolutionary lightweight detoxifying, silicone-free gel-primer absorbs instantly creating the ultimate protected, smooth surface; hydration levels are visibly boosted, the skin’s natural healthy barrier function is noticeably strengthened while wrinkles and pores are blurred to create healthy, flawless-looking skin. BIOACTIVE INGREDIENTS. Offering a blend of Bioactive Ingredients including: Anti-Pollution Shield Complex - A potent formula, Prebiotic-Peptide, Gel-Primer Base Complex offers a silicone-free base with skin hydrating properties and Ganoderma Mushroom Extract inhibits oxidation and inflammation which assists in the detoxification of skin cells. THE GROWN ALCHEMIST DIFFERENCE. Providing the most advanced natural cosmetic products, everything is formulated with the purest and highest quality active ingredients supported by scientific research and clinical results. Developed by a multidisciplinary team of skin scientists and nutrition

Title: Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit with Ultra Gentle Lotion, Bubble Bath, Foaming Shampoo & Wash, Nourishing Baby Oil, and Face & Hand Cloths Description: Babies deserve a fresh start in life with ingredients from nature that are gentle for their delicate skin. Experience our most popular natural Burts Bees Baby products together in one. Our gentle, effective and natural baby products cleanse, soften and help moisturize babys precious skin safely and naturally. Its easy to make bath time fun with the mild, tear-free bubble bath, then simply cleanse with the foaming 2-in-1 baby shampoo and body wash. Finish by moisturizing with ultra gentle lotion and nourishing baby oil to keep skin soft and fresh. A pack of face and hand cloths is handy for on-the-go cleansing. These baby care essentials are pediatrician tested, gentle enough to use every day and formulated without parabens, phthalates, SLS, petrolatum or synthetic fragrances, so you can feel good about caring for babys delicate skin. This new baby gift basket is a sweet gift for any baby shower occasion.

Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

candidate_texts: Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

GIOVANNI was the first full-range, salon-inspired hair-care brand in natural product stores, and today is the #1 selling Hair Care* lines in the United States Natural Products Industry. But before there was a brand, there was a pioneer. Arthur Guidotti had a vision and a love for all things hair. He began developing his passion as a hairstylist in Hollywood and Beverly Hills. By the 1960s, Arthur was maturing his talents and decided to open his own salon, called On Sunset. The salon was a bustling site, on the famous Sunset Strip, and a hit with many Hollywood celebrities, including Lucille Ball. candidate_texts: Title: Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit with Ultra Gentle Lotion, Bubble Bath, Foaming Shampoo & Wash, Nourishing Baby Oil, and Face & Hand Cloths Description: Babies deserve a fresh start in life with ingredients from nature that are gentle for their delicate skin. Experience our most popular natural Burts Bees Baby products together in one. Our gentle, effective and natural baby products cleanse, soften and help moisturize babys precious skin safely and naturally. Its easy to make bath time fun with the mild, tear-free bubble bath, then simply cleanse with the foaming 2-in-1 baby shampoo and body wash. Finish by moisturizing with ultra gentle lotion and nourishing baby oil to keep skin soft and fresh. A pack of face and hand cloths is handy for on-the-go cleansing. These baby care essentials are pediatrician tested, gentle enough to use every day and formulated without parabens, phthalates, SLS, petrolatum or synthetic fragrances, so you can feel good about caring for babys delicate skin. This new baby gift basket is a sweet gift for any baby shower occasion.

Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

Title: OZNaturals Facial Sunscreen This Anti Aging SPF 30, Broad Spectrum, Mineral Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide Will Help You Keep That Healthy Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing a facial sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin. As a zinc sunscreen, it utilizes the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, along with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate. This natural sunscreen offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a moisturizing formulation.

ACSU Description: This high quality non-latex and non-allergenic blending sponges for makeup is the best option to upgrade your makeup game and feel your better self. This sponge absorbs the minimum possible amount of makeup product leaving a perfect finish on the skin, it works perfectly with every type of makeup product such as liquid, cream or powder. Have the best experience with the soft feeling of our black makeup sponge. We recommend you to get your sponge wet and squeeze it until it has fully expanded. Once it has soak enough water, squeeze the sponge until it does not have any excess water and it will be perfectly dampened to start applying your makeup. Apply or set your makeup with bouncing motion, use the pointed side to blend makeup under the eyes and places that are hard to get into, like around the nose; the round sides for large areas of the face and the flat sides for contour, baking and precise effects. Wash it with soap and water, massage it until it is clean after each use. Let it dry

Title: UNGLINGA Black Mask Blackhead Remover Purifying Peel Off Mask Bamboo Activated Charcoal Face Deep Pore Cleansing Mask For Face Nose and Acne Blemishes Treatment Description: CONCERNS: Enlarged pore, Blackheads, Anti-aging, Fine lines and blemishes, Oily skin, Strawberry nose. Effect: Absorbent pores of blackheads and stubborn dirt, shrink pores, regulate oil secretion. How to use： Step 1 : Wash your face with warm water and cover it with a hot towel to open the pores . Step 2 : Spread the Blackhead remover mask gently on your face and wait 10-15 for it to dry. Step 3 : Peel off the black mask gently from chin to forehead . Step 4 : Rains with cold water and you may apply your daily skin care products afterwards. Tips: 1.The Blackhead Mask is only used for removing blackheads, exfoliating and cleaning the skin. 2.No effective against acne. Don’t use it on your acne or inflamed areas. 3.Spread the Blackhead Mask slowly in the same direction on your face and don’t stay on the same area too long. 4. Title: Lenghthening Mascara by Almay,Volume & Lift, Eye Makeup, Hypoallergenic and Fragrance Free, 010 Blackest Black, 0.24 Fl Oz Description: Enjoy visibly longer, lifted lashes in one gentle swipe with Almay Length & Lift Mascara™. Our clean, flake-free formula is enriched with a lash-caring complex of plant-based waxes and hair conditioners that nourish for healthy looking eyelashes. Plus, the brush is made of 100% plant-derived bristles that are designed to evenly coat and separate lashes from root to tip. We also ensured that our newest mascara is smooth and buildable—no clumps or smudging—making it the perfect finishing touch to any look, be it everyday glam, a smoky eye, or cat eye. What’s more, we tested our product to ensure it is suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers, so go ahead and magnify lashes to your chosen intensity! And because we love the environment as much as we love your delicate eyes, part of the mascara packaging is made with post-consumer recycled materials. This Mist will seal in any hairstyle, bridging the gap between natural and salon quality. GIOVANNI was the first full-range, salon-inspired hair-care brand in natural product stores, and today is the #1 selling Hair Care* lines in the United States Natural Products Industry. But before there was a brand, there was a pioneer. Arthur Guidotti had a vision and a love for all things hair. He began developing his passion as a hairstylist in Hollywood and Beverly Hills. By the 1960s, Arthur was maturing his talents and decided to open his own salon, called On Sunset. The salon was a bustling site, on the famous Sunset Strip, and a hit with many Hollywood celebrities, including Lucille Ball. Since 1979 the GIOVANNI Rule of Balance has been our commitment to make each product as pure and as natural as possible without sacrificing exceptional product performance. candidate_texts: Title: OZNaturals Facial Sunscreen This Anti Aging SPF 30, Broad Spectrum, Mineral Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide Will Help You Keep That Healthy Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing a facial sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin. As a zinc sunscreen, it utilizes the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, along with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate. This natural sunscreen offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a moisturizing formulation.

Title: essence | Welcome to Miami Eyeshadow Palette | 12 Highly Pigmented, Blendable Shades | Matte & Metallic | Vegan & Cruelty Free | Made Without Oil, Fragrance, Parabens, Alcohol, & Microplastic Particles Description: ¡BIENVENIDOS A MIAMI! With the essence welcome to MIAMI eyeshadow palette, we're bringing the sunny vibes of Florida into our make-up bags. The bright and bold color palette is inspired by the iconic Miami beaches and art deco landmarks. The 12 highly-pigmented are sure to create a feeling of happiness with their nude, pink, violet, turquoise and green shades. Thanks to the diverse finishes ranging from matte to metallic, you can create countless looks for any occasion. This product is vegan & cruelty free and is formulated without oil, fragrance, parabens, alcohol, & microplastic particles.

Title: Makeup Blender Sponge- Makeup Sponges For Foundation And Beauty Products- Latex Free Makeup Sponge- Beauty Sponge For Liquid, Cream And Powder Makeup. ACSU Description: This high quality non-latex and non-allergenic blending sponges for makeup is the best option to upgrade your makeup game and feel your better self. This sponge absorbs the minimum possible amount of makeup product leaving a perfect finish on the skin, it works perfectly with every type of makeup product such as liquid, cream or powder. Have the best experience with the soft feeling of our black makeup sponge. We recommend you to get your sponge wet and squeeze it until it has fully expanded. Once it has soak enough water, squeeze the sponge until it does not have any excess water and it will be perfectly dampened to start applying your makeup. Apply or set your makeup with bouncing motion, use the pointed side to blend makeup under the eyes and places that are hard to get into, like around the nose; the round sides for large areas of the face and the flat sides for contour, baking and precise effects. Wash it with soap and water, massage it until it is clean after each use. Let it dry

Title: Kidskin- Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil- Helps Combat Body and Foot Odor and Stubborn Body Acne and Skin Issues - Cruelty Free, Gluten Free, Paraben Free, Sulfate Free, Unscented, and Vegan- Made in USA Description: Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is designed exclusively for teens, tweens, pre teens, and boys and girls to work as an effective, yet gentle body wash. Natural ingredients like Allantoin and Bisabolol nourish beyond surface level, and penetrate into the lower levels of the skin for the deepest hydration possible, while active ingredient tea tree oil works to fight body acne and skin issues teens are commonly prone to. Unlike shower bars and other soaps, our products are designed to soothe problematic and compromised skin. With 100% Natural ingredients that are paraben, sulfate, fragrance, and gluten free, the Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is gentle enough for every day use. candidate_texts: Title: OZNaturals Tinted Moisturizer, SPF 30 Sunscreen. Broad Spectrum Protection. Zinc Oxide + Minerals In This Tinted Sunscreen Protects, Moisturizes And Blends Well To Provide A Rich, Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Tinted Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin with a healthy-looking hint of color. Utilizing the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate, our formula offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a luxurious tinted moisturizer formulation.

Title: OZNaturals Facial Sunscreen This Anti Aging SPF 30, Broad Spectrum, Mineral Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide Will Help You Keep That Healthy Youthful Glow! Description: Skin care experts and dermatologists are in agreement on the importance of wearing a facial sunscreen. Most premature aging of the skin is caused by sun exposure. “Photo aging,” as is it known in skin care circles, includes wrinkles, freckles, age spots, blotchy complexion, dullness, sagging skin and rough, leathery texture. In other words, just about every complaint surrounding aging skin can be traced at least in part to sun exposure, making daily sunscreen protection with an SPF 30 sunscreen a must. But not all sunscreens are created equal. OZNaturals Age Defying Solar Shield SPF 30 Broad Spectrum Sunscreen with Zinc Oxide provides broad spectrum protection from the sun’s harmful UVA/UVB rays, while moisturizing skin. As a zinc sunscreen, it utilizes the highly stable and reflective properties of Zinc Oxide, along with the natural UV diluting qualities of Octyl Methoxycinnamate. This natural sunscreen offers sheer, broad-spectrum UV coverage in a moisturizing formulation.

Marula oil is a natural oil & is known for its ability to moisturize and protect the skin, as well as to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines. This body scrub is also made with Himalayan pink salt, which is a natural exfoliator that helps to remove dead skin cells and leave your skin feeling smooth and soft. The scrub is gentle enough for daily use, and it is perfect for all skin types. Usage: Apply a generous amount of scrub to wet skin. Massage in circular motions for 2-3 minutes. Rinse with water. Use 2 times per week for best results. Caution: Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with water. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. At Frecia’s Allure, we use only 100% pure Brazilian Rose Quartz in our Rose Quartz Facial Roller & Gua Sha Kit, for skincare tools that won’t chip or crack. Our die-cast, single-piece roller handles are rust-resistant, and while many gua sha tools are disappointingly thin and frail, our Gua Sha is thick and substantial – for a comfortable hand feel and broader skin contact. Squeaky facial rollers spoiling your zen at-home spa session? Our face rollers are crafted with special silicone inserts to eliminate noise – so you can enjoy quiet, relaxing home skincare sessions. Title: Philips Norelco QC5055 Power Hair Clipper Description: Product Description Philips Norelco's Power Hair Clipper cuts normal, coarse and curly hair. The turbo power option can be turned on when hair is more difficult to get through. This easy-to-use hair clipper brings simplicity to you life, giving you all the options without all the pieces. This body scrub is also made with Himalayan pink salt, which is a natural exfoliator that helps to remove dead skin cells and leave your skin feeling smooth and soft. The scrub is gentle enough for daily use, and it is perfect for all skin types. Usage: Apply a generous amount of scrub to wet skin. Massage in circular motions for 2-3 minutes. Rinse with water. Title: Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit with Ultra Gentle Lotion, Bubble Bath, Foaming Shampoo & Wash, Nourishing Baby Oil, and Face & Hand Cloths Description: Babies deserve a fresh start in life with ingredients from nature that are gentle for their delicate skin. Experience our most popular natural Burts Bees Baby products together in one. Our gentle, effective and natural baby products cleanse, soften and help moisturize babys precious skin safely and naturally. Its easy to make bath time fun with the mild, tear-free bubble bath, then simply cleanse with the foaming 2-in-1 baby shampoo and body wash. Finish by moisturizing with ultra gentle lotion and nourishing baby oil to keep skin soft and fresh. A pack of face and hand cloths is handy for on-the-go cleansing. These baby care essentials are pediatrician tested, gentle enough to use every day and formulated without parabens, phthalates, SLS, petrolatum or synthetic fragrances, so you can feel good about caring for babys delicate skin. This new baby gift basket is a sweet gift for any baby shower occasion.
